name: Sausage Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the onions and sausage. Drain well.
2. Add the onions, Parmesan, Swiss, Tabasco, salt, and parsley to a bowl.
3. Make a batter by mixing biscuit mix, milk, and mayonnaise in a separate bowl.
4. Spread half of the batter in a greased 9x9x2-inch pan.
5. Pour the sausage mixture into the pan.
6. Spread the remaining batter on top of the sausage mixture.
7. Mix the egg yolk and water separately.
8. Spread the egg yolk mixture on top of the cake.
9. Bake at 400°F for 25 to 30 minutes until the cake pulls away from the edge of the pan.
10. Let cool for 5 minutes before cutting into squares.
